_comment: Verified INND corporate events for the CFO stock workbook. Splits from Polygon/Massive reference + Seeking Alpha. Press releases from StockTitan / PR Newswire / company IR. Public data, internal CFO record-keeping only (securities firewall: never for promotion). Dates are the announcement/effective date; the skill attaches each to the nearest trading day on or after.

events.text: World Hearing Day: OTC hearing aids offered in 1,500+ Walmart Vision Centers + Walmart.com
FY2022 financial results announced (reported a profitable year)
iHEAR Matrix OTC hearing aids launch in 4,218 Walmart stores ($499/pair)

Strategic alliance in Ainnova Tech's acquisition of OTCHealth Inc.: retail ops (Walmart, CVS, Target, Walgreens, 15,000+ pharmacies) transition to OTCHealth; INND to receive equity + profit participation in OTCHealth and Ainnova
